description: CompositionHalf sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has black, white and grey plaid checks, tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar, patch pocket on the left chest with buttoned closure and with embroidered brand name on top, full length buttoned placket with black tape detailing on the facing placket at the end and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this  black and white plaid check shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
